markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Hypermode's content strategy and engagement with GrowthX, focusing on budget, timeline, and SOW details.](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed to start engagement on Feb 10th, focusing initially on migration strategy and advisory](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Recommended treating D-Graph as an acquisition, redirecting CTAs to Hypermode while maintaining D-Graph's traffic](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Removed link building from initial scope, will focus on content creation and migration strategy](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of high-volume content experimentation for effective SEO results](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

## Topics

### Budget and Phased Approach

  - [Jessica proposed a phased, milestone-based approach to the SOW](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [GrowthX typically anchors around 50,000 words/month (15-25 pieces of content)](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Emphasized need for high-volume experimentation to learn what works](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Content production costs roughly $0.10-$0.20 per word](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Timeline Adjustment

  - [Original start date was February 17th](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Agreed to move start date to February 10th](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [First week (Feb 10-17) to focus on migration strategy and advisory](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Official kickoff still set for February 17th](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### D-Graph to Hypermode Migration Strategy

  - [Treat like an acquisition: maintain D-Graph, redirect CTAs to Hypermode](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Refresh D-Graph content with Hypermode CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Start aggressive new content publication on Hypermode](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Monitor traffic and conversions before full migration](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Expect potential short-term traffic dip during transition](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Focus on indexing, impressions, and clicks as early KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Expect 3-month timeframe to see significant results (based on Galileo AI example)](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Hypermode's current domain authority: 21/100 vs. D-Graph's 38/100](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Removed link building from initial scope, can add later if needed](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

### Content Quality and Production Process

  - [GrowthX has improved content workflows significantly](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Will rerun and refresh relevant D-Graph topics before migration](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Commitment to not publish content without client approval](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send revised SOW for February 10th start date](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Jessica to collect thoughts on strategy for kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Schedule calls with Jimmy and Nika for migration advisory](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Hypermode to provide access to Search Console for accurate traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Begin planning D-Graph content refresh with Hypermode CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Establish metrics for monitoring D-Graph to Hypermode conversions](https://fathom.video/share/erXVT3-bk35ck6fT73Uag7-EBdgebSCQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
